+++++ docs/design/2024-01-01-dot-loom-architecture.md
# Dot Loom Architecture

## Overview

Dot Loom is a task execution engine that orchestrates the execution of tasks across a network of workers. It is designed to be flexible, scalable, and efficient, allowing for the execution of a wide range of tasks with varying requirements.

## Components

### Task

A task is a unit of work that needs to be executed. It is defined by a set of parameters, including the task type, input data, and any constraints on the execution of the task.

### Worker

A worker is a service that can execute tasks. Workers are responsible for performing the actual work required by the task, and they are selected by the task execution engine based on their capabilities and availability.

### Task Execution Engine

The task execution engine is responsible
